title: Executive Assistant
description:
Key Responsibilities:

· Manage the Executive’s calendar, including the scheduling of appointments, meetings, and conference calls, as well as the coordination of travel arrangements.

· Screen and prioritize incoming calls, emails, and other correspondence, responding to or redirecting inquiries as appropriate.

· Prepare, review, and edit business correspondence, presentations, reports, and other documents, ensuring accuracy, clarity, and a high standard of professionalism.

· Coordinate and compile materials for meetings, including agendas, presentations, and supporting documentation.

· Attend meetings alongside the Executive when necessary, take accurate minutes, and follow up on action items to ensure timely completion.

· Support special projects and strategic initiatives by conducting research, compiling relevant data, and preparing comprehensive reports as required.

· Organize executive events and functions, handling logistics and liaising with both internal teams and external stakeholders.

· Manage expense claims and financial tracking, including receipt compilation and preparation of detailed expense reports.

· Maintain a high level of confidentiality and handle sensitive information with utmost discretion and professionalism.

· Oversee document handling tasks such as printing, binding, courier arrangements, copying, and filing.

· Assist in drafting responses and other written communications for the CEO’s review and approval.

· Perform general administrative duties, including scanning, ordering supplies, and maintaining efficient Executive office operations.

· Carry out other ad-hoc responsibilities as assigned by the Executive.

postedCompany.description:
Wenetgroup Ltd is an enterprise management consulting firm. We are dedicated on providing professional service to assist our customers on problem solving and enlarge factors of success. We are focus on customer service and create Exquisite Service experience. Our HQ office is in Taiwan, Taipei. Our overseas office is located at America, Japan, Malaysia, Singapore.

Our service:

  1. Create new Business branding strategy
  2.  Plan and execute marketing strategy
  3. Plan integrated management
  4. Design operation management
  5. Cultivate and manage talents
  6. Other Professional Services (Project Management, Event Management, Finance Management, Lawyer, Human Resource Management, Technology Application…etc)
